, February 13th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, February 14th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable till 10:00am W

3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable till 10:00am Wednesday, February 14th, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases), and login.eecs will be patched and rebooted Tu

s), and login.eecs will be patched and rebooted Tuesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, February 14th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for dow

the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). UPDATE [2024-02-16 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-02-16 1:00pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Ac
